subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested Himself through His Name, the All-Powerful, over all created things, and from Whom have appeared the possessors of might and power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی تجلی باسمه القادر علی الممکنات و ظهر منه اولو القدره و القوه و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
